properties.entry: SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) AS x FROM r)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) AS x, b AS y FROM r GROUP BY b)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT count(*) AS x FROM (SELECT sum(a) AS x, b AS y FROM r GROUP BY b) x)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT b AS x FROM r GROUP BY b)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a AS x, count(b) AS y FROM r GROUP BY a)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT min(a) AS x, max(a) as y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT ROUND(x::numeric,1) AS x, ROUND(y::numeric,2) AS y, PROV_R_A, PROV_R_B FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT round(avg(a)::numeric,1)::numeric AS x, round(avg(b)::numeric,2)::numeric AS y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a AS x, count(b) AS y FROM r GROUP BY a)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(A) AS x, round(avg(b)::numeric,2) AS Y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a as x FROM R GROUP BY a HAVING avg(b)>1)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a*6 as x FROM R GROUP BY a HAVING count(b)=2)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT x+2 as x FROM (SELECT a+b as x, c as y FROM R, S WHERE c>1) sub GROUP BY x)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT b*3 as x, (b+a*c)-a as y, d-b as z FROM R,S)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT x+2 as z, x as t, sum(x) as s FROM (SELECT a+b as x, c as y FROM R, S WHERE c>2) sub GROUP BY x)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT round(avg(a)::numeric,2) AS x, round(avg(a+b)::numeric,1) AS y, round(sum(0.1 + a*b*(d-c)/2),1) AS z FROM R, S WHERE b>c)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) FROM R WHERE b <> b)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT * FROM r, (SELECT min(a) AS x FROM r) m WHERE r.a = m.x)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT * FROM (SELECT max(a) AS y FROM r) n, (SELECT min(a) AS x FROM r) m WHERE n.y != m.x)) sub;
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) AS x FROM r)) sub;
SELECT Y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) AS x, b AS y FROM r GROUP BY b)) sub;
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT count(*) AS x FROM (SELECT sum(a) AS x, b AS y FROM r GROUP BY b) x)) sub;
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT b AS x FROM r GROUP BY b)) sub;
SELECT y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a AS x, count(b) AS y FROM r GROUP BY a));
SELECT y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT min(a) AS x, max(a) as y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT round(avg(a)::numeric,1) AS x, round(avg(b)::numeric,2) AS y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a AS x, count(b) AS y FROM r GROUP BY a));
SELECT y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(A) AS x, round(avg(b)::numeric,2) AS Y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a as x FROM R GROUP BY a HAVING avg(b)>1)) sub;
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a*6 as x FROM R GROUP BY a HAVING count(b)=2)) sub;
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT x+2 as x FROM (SELECT a+b as x, c as y FROM R, S WHERE c>1) sub GROUP BY x)) sub;
SELECT Y,X FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT b*3 as x, (b+a*c)-a as y, d-b as z FROM R,S)) sub;
SELECT S,T FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT x+2 as z, x as t, sum(x) as s FROM (SELECT a+b as x, c as y FROM R, S WHERE c>2) sub GROUP BY x)) sub;
SELECT Z,Y FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT round(avg(a),2) AS x, round(avg(a+b),1) AS y, round(sum(0.1 + a*b*(d-c)/2),1) AS z FROM R, S WHERE b>c));
SELECT "sum(a)" FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) FROM R WHERE b <> b)) sub;
SELECT b FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT * FROM r, (SELECT min(a) AS x FROM r) m WHERE r.a = m.x));
SELECT x FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT * FROM (SELECT max(a) AS y FROM r) n, (SELECT min(a) AS x FROM r) m WHERE n.y != m.x)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_b FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) AS x FROM r)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) AS x, b AS y FROM r GROUP BY b)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT count(*) AS x FROM (SELECT sum(a) AS x, b AS y FROM r GROUP BY b) x)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT b AS x FROM r GROUP BY b)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a AS x, count(b) AS y FROM r GROUP BY a)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT min(a) AS x, max(a) as y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT round(avg(a),1) AS x, round(avg(b),2) AS y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a AS x, count(b) AS y FROM r GROUP BY a)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(A) AS x, round(avg(b),2) AS Y FROM r)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a as x FROM R GROUP BY a HAVING avg(b)>1)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT a*6 as x FROM R GROUP BY a HAVING count(b)=2)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT x+2 as x FROM (SELECT a+b as x, c as y FROM R, S WHERE c>1) sub GROUP BY x)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT b*3 as x, (b+a*c)-a as y, d-b as z FROM R,S)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT x+2 as z, x as t, sum(x) as s FROM (SELECT a+b as x, c as y FROM R, S WHERE c>2) sub GROUP BY x)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT round(avg(a),2) AS x, round(avg(a+b),1) AS y, round(sum(0.1 + a*b*(d-c)/2),1) AS z FROM R, S WHERE b>c)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT sum(a) FROM R WHERE b <> b)) sub;
prov_r_a | ----------- NULL |
SELECT prov_r_a, prov_r_1_b FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT * FROM r, (SELECT min(a) AS x FROM r) m WHERE r.a = m.x)) sub;
SELECT prov_r_b, prov_r_1_a FROM (PROVENANCE OF (SELECT * FROM (SELECT max(a) AS y FROM r) n, (SELECT min(a) AS x FROM r) m WHERE n.y != m.x)) sub;
